prompt: A vertical new-Chinese-style fantasy character poster on textured xuan paper, rendered in elegant monochrome ink-wash with muted teal accents and very subtle gold line tracery. Center a full-body male cultivator named 韩立 standing on a dark lakeside rock in a misty mountain landscape. He is tall, calm, and scholarly, with long black hair tied half-up and the rest flowing in the wind, wearing layered hanfu robes in deep blue-green and pale gray: a dark outer cloak with wide sleeves, a pale inner robe, embroidered trim, ornate waist ornaments, tassels, and flowing translucent fabric ribbons. His expression should feel composed, aloof, and immortal. One hand hangs naturally, while the other is slightly raised, holding a faint swirling magical aura of pale blue-white spiritual energy. The composition uses strong negative space and a refined poster layout: the character slightly right of center, towering ink mountains fading into fog behind him, bamboo on the upper right, a quiet lake below, a small pavilion on a rocky outcrop at the lower right, sparse trees on the left shore, and delicate drifting petals near the ground. Add thin meandering gold decorative lines across the background and foreground. The overall palette is restrained, soft, and atmospheric, with a literati painting mood and cinematic character-poster polish. Include exactly 4 text elements integrated into the design: large vertical black calligraphy on the upper left reading "韩立", a small red seal near it, one vertical poetic line below it reading "青衫临风，道心如渊", a small Romanized name "Han Li" beneath, and one small centered line of Chinese text at the bottom reading 行于凡尘之外，心向大道之巅. Make the image feel like a premium series poster for 凡人修仙传, with accurate brush-calligraphy typography, soft mist depth, flowing cloth motion, and an ethereal immortal-hero presence.
